problem_text_cn: 匀质圆柱形弹性体（自由长度L₀、质量m、倔强系数K，杨氏模量E=KL₀/S）垂直悬挂并达到平衡伸长。1. 求弹性体的总伸长量ΔL；2. 若K=mg/L₀，求伸长平衡时质量线密度λ(x)的分布（x轴竖直向下，原点在悬挂处）。
problem_text_en: A homogeneous cylindrical elastic body（free length L₀、mass m、spring constant K，Young's modulus E=KL₀/S）is vertically suspended and reaches equilibrium elongation。1. Find the total elongation ΔL of the elastic body；2. If K=mg/L₀，find the distribution of mass linear density λ(x) at equilibrium elongation（x-axis is vertically downward，origin at the suspension point）.
problem_solution_cn: （1）总伸长量ΔL：- 取x'为弹性体原长坐标，小段dx'的张力F(x')=λ₀g(L₀−x')（λ₀=m/L₀）；- 由胡克定律dL=F(x')dx'/(ES)，积分得ΔL=∫₀^L₀ [λ₀g(L₀−x')/(KL₀)]dx'=mg/(2K)。（2）质量线密度分布λ(x)：- 小段dx'伸长后实际长度dx'+dL，线密度λ=λ₀dx'/(dx'+dL)；- 代入K=mg/L₀，推导x与x'的关系x=x'+ΔLₓ'，解得λ(x)=m/[L₀√(4−2x/L₀)]。
problem_solution_en: （1）Total elongation ΔL：- Take x' as the original length coordinate of the elastic body，the tension of the small segment dx' F(x')=λ₀g(L₀−x')（λ₀=m/L₀）；- From Hooke's law dL=F(x')dx'/(ES)，integrating to get ΔL=∫₀^L₀ [λ₀g(L₀−x')/(KL₀)]dx'=mg/(2K)。（2）Distribution of mass linear density λ(x)：- The actual length of the small segment dx' after elongation is dx'+dL，linear density λ=λ₀dx'/(dx'+dL)；- Substituting K=mg/L₀，deriving the relationship between x and x' x=x'+ΔLₓ'，solving to get λ(x)=m/[L₀√(4−2x/L₀)]。
problem_answer: 1. 总伸长量$\Delta L= rac{m g}{2 K}{$}；2. 质量线密度分布$\lambda(x)= rac{m}{L_0 \sqrt{4 -  rac{2x}{L_0}{}}}$
